MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUEST, DEMAND INSPECTION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION & TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR JAN-19-2005 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 610
ORDER STRIKING THE CLAIM OF ANTHONY MODICA
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-11-2005 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

DISCOVERY 610, APPEARANCES: PAMELA UNDERWOOD, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY FOR PETITIONER AND MOVING PARTY: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA NO OTHER APPEARANCES, TENTATIVE ADOPTED: NO OPPOSITION HAVING BEEN FILED, PETITIONER'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS, FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. RESPONDENT IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN
